text.title: voice-implementation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for voice-implementation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Registering async def tool functions in the tool_functions dict.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ProductionVoiceAgent calls tool functions synchronously. Async functions return coroutine objects, not results. Use sync implementations or wrap with asyncio.run().

failure-mode.description: Using bare except Exception in the WebSocket endpoint.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: WebSocketDisconnect must be handled separately from actual errors - they require different logging and response behavior. Catch WebSocketDisconnect first, then generic exceptions.
